summary: Renovate Bot patch bump of @composio/mastra from ^0.6.3 to ^0.6.4 in packages/editor/package.json. The companion @composio/core ^0.6.4 update was already merged in PR #14046. Changes are limited to package.json version specifier, pnpm-lock.yaml, and an auto-generated changeset.
maintainerNotes: PR is approved and mergeable with no conflicts. CI shows 2 failures (Full Test Suite and Observability Package Tests) but these appear unrelated to this dependency bump — the diff only touches the @composio/mastra version specifier. Memory Tests and E2E Tests are still pending. The companion @composio/core update was already merged, so this aligns the @composio/mastra peer dependency to the same version. Safe to merge once pending checks complete or if failures are confirmed unrelated.
